verification_policy: Human verification recommended for any low/very-low-resource output before client delivery.

recommended_resources.name: OPUS-MT (opus-mt-tc-big-en-pt)
recommended_resources.venue: Tiedemann & Thottingal, EAMT 2020 (aclanthology.org/2020.eamt-1.61); Tiedemann et al., LRE 2023
recommended_resources.offline: Lightweight per-pair Marian-NMT model — among the best for offline mobile.
recommended_resources.notes: Use the >>por<< prefix token to steer the target variant; ROMANCE family covers many pairs.

recommended_resources.name: MADLAD-400-3B-MT
recommended_resources.offline: GGUF 2–4-bit quantization brings the 3B model under ~1–2 GB.
recommended_resources.notes: MADLAD-400 distinguishes pt (Brazil) from pt-PT in its data.

recommended_resources.name: NLLB-200 (distilled 600M)
recommended_resources.offline: Convert to CTranslate2 / quantize (int8) for low-RAM phones.

resources.name: SeamlessM4T v2 (large)
resources.modality: speech+text (ASR, speech→text translation, S2ST, T2ST, T2TT)
resources.offline: Large multimodal model (~2B+); run server-side or quantize/prune for device. Heavier than text-only MT.
resources.notes: Speech recognition + speech translation across ~100 languages; non-commercial licence.

integration_notes: Models default to Brazilian usage; flag European Portuguese (pt-PT) separately if needed.
